title: Definition
text: Definition Contents of the translation table. It is better to provide as many definitions as possible, even if the device does not actually support a feature. Applies To Device Translation Table Keyboard Translation Table Related Links Device Translation Table Syntax A device translation table contains delimiters that mark the beginning and end of the table and sections within the table. Each section contains mapping definitions that define an output code sequence or character, the corresponding Uniface meta code (a function mnemonic or meta character), and optional description or comments. Keyboard Translation Table Syntax Keyboard translation tables map input codes from keyboards or database to logical Uniface functions and characters. Device Translation Tables Device translation tables handle output to screens and printers. They map Uniface logical functions onto device functions, making it possible for Uniface to support a wide variety of hardware platforms, including their output devices. Keyboard Translation Tables A keyboard translation table maps a sequence of input codes received from a keyboard or database to logical function codes and characters recognized by Uniface.
